name: Beef Roasts
recipeIngredient: 1 beef roast (ensuring it fits in the crock pot)
spices (Mrs. Dash Garlic and Herb, additional garlic, pepper)
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the beef roast on all sides in a little oil.
2. Place the roast in the crock pot.
3. Add 6-8 pieces of onion.
4. Sprinkle with spices (Mrs. Dash Garlic and Herb, additional garlic, pepper).
5. Pour water into the crock pot until covered.
6. Optionally add a dash of beef boullion granules.
7. Cover and set to high for 5-6 hours.
8. Add quartered potatoes and other root vegetables during the last 60-80 minutes.
